goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'museum of classical archaeology'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should go to 'stevenage' and should 'leave after 11:30'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called museum of classical archaeology
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on wednesday
The train should go to stevenage and should leave after 11:30
Make sure you get arrival time
